parties.name: AKRAMI, FARHAD 330 PARKER AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Farhad Akrami in Propria Persona.
Sreea Mukherji also present.

Mr. Akrami stated that the documents he has don't list his birth date correctly, that he has a legal permanent resident card and a state identification that reflect the incorrect date, that his correct date of birth is July 4, 1998 and that he has no other records. The Court asks why he has not requested to amend said documents. Ms. Mukherji stated that they had not thought about it, that Mr. Akrami has been using immigration papers, that immigration will not change anything without a Court order and presented a declaration from Mr. Akrami's Mother and one from his Aunt. The Court noted that it reviewed said declarations and that he agrees that they support the fact that Mr. Akrami was born on July 4, 1998. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth is taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Oct-04-2017 Continued To Oct-16-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
